# Aktiechefen: "Verkstadssektorn mår förvånansvärt bra"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-11  
**Market Sentiment**: Negative

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode is a macro-geopolitical discussion centered on the escalating Iran conflict, the collapse of an April ceasefire, and the implications of a prolonged war for oil, inflation, and the cost of capital. Hosts argue a quick diplomatic resolution is unlikely as both Iran and Trump believe time is on their side, and they note the narrative on US rates has shifted so a hike is now more likely than a cut. No individual companies are discussed.

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
